businessDetails.notableClients: City of Juneau, Bergmann Properties, Juneau School District
businessDetails.certifications: EPA 608 Certified, NATE-Certified Technicians, BBB Accredited

announcement: Now booking summer AC tune-ups — schedule before June 1 and save $40!

seo.seoTitle: Peak Home Services | HVAC & Plumbing in Juneau, AK
seo.seoDescription: Juneau's trusted HVAC, plumbing, and home services company. Same-day diagnostics, price-lock guarantee, and 24/7 emergency support.

hero.heroSub: HVAC, plumbing, and emergency repairs — done right the first time by technicians you can trust.

about.aboutTitle: Built on Trust, Driven by Results
about.aboutBody: Peak Home Services has been keeping Juneau homes comfortable since 2011. From routine maintenance to emergency callouts in the middle of winter, our team shows up fast and fixes it right. We believe in transparent pricing, honest advice, and work that lasts.

pillars.d: Every technician is fully licensed, bonded, and covered so you have zero liability.
We keep trucks staged around Juneau to respond within hours — not days.
The quote we give you is the price you pay. No invoice surprises.
Over 300 verified reviews across Google and Facebook from real Juneau customers.

servicesSection.servicesSub: From seasonal tune-ups to full system replacements, we handle it all under one roof.

work.workSub: A sample of installations and repairs we're proud to put our name on.

projects.t: Bergmann Apartment Complex — Full HVAC Retrofit
projects.caption: Replaced aging baseboard heat with a multi-zone mini-split system across all 18 units.
Full copper-to-PEX repipe completed in two days with zero drywall damage.
Coordinated off-season boiler replacement across three district facilities with zero classroom disruption.

faqMeta.faqSub: Everything you need to know before booking.

finalCta.finalCtaSub: No pressure, no obligation — just an honest assessment of what your home needs and what it'll cost.

footer.footerBlurb: Peak Home Services has been Juneau's go-to HVAC, plumbing, and home repair contractor since 2011. Licensed, insured, and always available when you need us most.
footer.footerLegal: © 2026 Peak Home Services LLC. All rights reserved.

heroSlides.alt: Peak Home Services team on the job

services.d: We install and replace all major HVAC brands. Mini-splits, ducted systems, and heat pumps — sized right for Alaska's climate.
From leaky faucets to whole-home repiping, our licensed plumbers handle residential and commercial jobs of any size.
Annual tune-up programs that keep your systems efficient, your warranties valid, and your energy bills predictable year-round.
Pipes burst at 2am. Furnaces die on the coldest night of the year. Our emergency crew is always on call.

testimonials.q: They showed up two hours after I called — on a Saturday — and had my furnace running before dinner. Incredibly professional and honest about pricing.
We've used Peak for all three of our rental properties for five years. Never a bad experience. The price-lock guarantee is real — what they quote is what we pay.
Fast, clean, and explained everything in plain English. My old contractor always made me feel like I was being upsold. Peak felt completely different.

faqs.a: Yes — all diagnostic visits and project estimates are free with no obligation to book.

faqs.q: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.a: Our emergency line operates 24/7. In most cases we can have a technician on-site within 2 hours anywhere in the Juneau area.
We serve Juneau, Douglas, Mendenhall Valley, Auke Bay, and surrounding communities within the City and Borough of Juneau.

faqs.q: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.a: Yes. All technicians hold current Alaska contractor licenses and are covered by liability insurance and workers' compensation.
